com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display

Class DisplayTextParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.DisplayTextParameters
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    DisplayCNTextParameters

    public class DisplayTextParameters
extends java.lang.Object
    Parameters for English text display.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      DisplayTextParameters() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      AlignType getAlignType()
      Gets the text position in a line.
      int getFontColor()
      Gets text font color.
      FontSize getFontSize()
      Gets text font size.
      void setAlignType(AlignType alignType)
      Sets the text position in a line.
      void setFontColor(int fontColor)
      Sets text font color.
      void setFontSize(FontSize fontSize)
      Sets text font size.

    • Constructor Detail

      • DisplayTextParameters

        public DisplayTextParameters()

    • Method Detail

      • getFontColor

        public int getFontColor()
        Gets text font color.
        Returns:
        Text font color. Value range: [0x0000-0xFFFF].

      • setFontColor

        public void setFontColor(int fontColor)
        Sets text font color.
        Parameters:
        fontColor - Text font color. Value range: [0x0000-0xFFFF]. It will not set font color when the value is <0.

      • getFontSize

        public FontSize getFontSize()
        Gets text font size.
        Returns:
        Text font size. See FontSize.

      • setFontSize

        public void setFontSize(FontSize fontSize)
        Sets text font size.
        Parameters:
        fontSize - Text font size. See FontSize. It will not set font size when the value is null.

      • getAlignType

        public AlignType getAlignType()
        Gets the text position in a line.
        Returns:
        Text position in a line. See AlignType.

      • setAlignType

        public void setAlignType(AlignType alignType)
        Sets the text position in a line.
        Parameters:
        alignType - Text position in a line. See AlignType. It will not set align type when the value is null.
